parameters.content:
## [Onboarding] Setup Client Sheet v1.0.0

Creates one Google Sheet per client with two tabs:
- **Leads**: [form fields] | Source | Status (dropdown) | Notes | Score | Score Reason | Contacted At | Booked At | Lead ID | Submitted At
- **Review Status**: Lead Name | Phone | Review Sent | Rating

Sheet is moved to 'Prod Lead Capture' Drive folder after creation.

Also upserts:
- caiac.clients.config lead_capture.sheet_id + field_map
- caiac.client_platform_config (full row incl. intake_config)

Inputs: client_id, client_slug, client_name, owner_email, field_map (JSON string), google_review_link
Outputs: sheet_id, sheet_url

parameters.query:
UPDATE caiac.clients
SET config = jsonb_set(
  jsonb_set(config, '{lead_capture,sheet_id}', to_jsonb('{{ $json.spreadsheet_id }}'::text)),
  '{lead_capture,field_map}',
  '{{ $json.field_map }}'::jsonb
)
WHERE id = '{{ $json.client_id }}'::uuid

INSERT INTO caiac.client_platform_config (client_slug, client_id, source_type, google_review_link, review_notify_email, lead_sheet_id, lead_sheet_tab, link_signing_secret, intake_config) VALUES ('{{ $('Generate Signing Secret').first().json.client_slug }}', '{{ $('Generate Signing Secret').first().json.client_id }}'::uuid, 'sheet', '{{ $('Generate Signing Secret').first().json.google_review_link }}', '{{ $('Generate Signing Secret').first().json.owner_email }}', '{{ $('Generate Signing Secret').first().json.spreadsheet_id }}', 'Leads', '{{ $('Generate Signing Secret').first().json.link_signing_secret }}', jsonb_build_object('field_map', '{{ $('Generate Signing Secret').first().json.field_map }}'::jsonb, 'status_values', '["New","Contacted","Booked","Completed","Not Interested","No Show"]'::jsonb)) ON CONFLICT ON CONSTRAINT client_platform_config_pkey DO UPDATE SET client_slug = EXCLUDED.client_slug, source_type = EXCLUDED.source_type, google_review_link = EXCLUDED.google_review_link, review_notify_email = EXCLUDED.review_notify_email, lead_sheet_id = EXCLUDED.lead_sheet_id, lead_sheet_tab = EXCLUDED.lead_sheet_tab, link_signing_secret = EXCLUDED.link_signing_secret, intake_config = EXCLUDED.intake_config, updated_at = now()

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $('Generate Signing Secret').first().json;
return [{ json: { success: true, sheet_id: data.spreadsheet_id, sheet_url: data.sheet_url } }];
